name: SwipeCircle
description: Mobile-first swipe-based social rating community with card-stack discovery, matching, chat, and profiles. The first Decantr blueprint built around a card-stack swipe loop on a mobile-tab-bar shell. Hinge meets BeReal meets a Dribbble shot — premium consumer dating-app vibe.
personality: Mobile-first social discovery with playful coral-pink energy and warm peach undertones. Photo-centric swipe deck dominates the screen — cards feel tactile, almost like polaroids you'd shuffle through. Pill-shaped buttons everywhere with bouncy spring physics. Soft drop shadows replace harsh borders. Bottom tabs provide always-visible navigation. Match moments feel celebratory with a coral-to-violet burst; chats feel intimate with rounded bubbles and warm timestamps. Empty states encourage rather than scold. Designed to feel native on iPhone but elegantly scaled on desktop with a 480px-wide centered column. Hinge meets BeReal meets a Dribbble shot — never desperate, always inviting. Every interaction rewards: the spring of a card, the burst of a like, the warmth of a new match.

voice.tone: Playful, warm, encouraging — never desperate, never pushy
voice.empty_states: Encouraging — 'You've seen everyone nearby! Check back later.' / 'Keep swiping — your circle is forming.' Never use the word error or failure in empty states.
voice.errors: Friendly — 'That didn't work, try again?' / 'Looks like that's taken — try another?' Avoid blame language.
voice.loading: Brief — 'Finding your circle…' / 'Bringing you new faces…' Never use spinning percentage indicators.
voice.metrics_format: Lowercase units — '124 swipes', '18 matches', '4.2★ rating'. No commas in small numbers; no leading zeros.

breakpoints.desktop: >=1024px (centered 480px column with optional decorative side gradients)

responsive_strategy.notes: App is mobile-portrait optimized. Desktop renders the same 480px-wide column centered with side gutters — no separate desktop layout. The swipe deck, tab bar, and card sizing remain identical across breakpoints.
